title: crotalaria kundelunguensis
intro: Crotalaria kundelunguensis, also known as Kundelungu rattle box or simply rattle box, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Crotalaria kundelunguensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin infections. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used to treat various ailments, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine.
